message:
feat(rchd,rch): fix RwLock borrow scoping, bypass hysteresis for deliberate actions, and add convergence tests

Fix repo_convergence RwLock borrow-checker issues by extracting write
guards into explicit scoped blocks instead of passing inline .write()
calls to record_transition_locked. Remove hysteresis gating from
mark_converging and record_convergence_attempt — these are deliberate
actions that should transition immediately (hysteresis only guards the
passive Ready/Drifting observation path).

Wire repo_convergence module into rchd main with dead_code annotation
(not yet integrated into daemon main loop).

Add comprehensive tests: canonicalize_sync_root_for_plan edge cases in
rch/hook.rs, plus staleness lifecycle, concurrent 20-worker stress test,
and budget exhaustion/recovery E2E tests in repo_convergence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
